1747000.name: Into The Wilderness
1747000.description:
A survival crafting game set in the forgotten forests of the Pacific Northwest.

In the summer of 1990, a series of solar flares—known as The Helios Surge—fractured Earth’s magnetic field and triggered a global infrastructure collapse. Electronics failed. Navigation broke. Time itself unraveled.

In Into the Wilderness, you play a survivor navigating a timeless landscape where nature reclaims everything. No working radios. No reliable maps. No one left to call for help.

Survival means listening to the land, scavenging what remains, and rebuilding from memory.

Features:

  • Explore a handcrafted forest filled with forgotten shelters buried beneath moss each telling a story of survival

  • Manage survival stats like hunger, thirst, rest, and health in a dynamic day/night cycle

  • Craft and maintain shelters using scavenged materials and legacy blueprints

  • Restore broken radio towers to uncover lost transmissions and piece together the past

  • Immerse yourself in an atmospheric world inspired by The Long Dark, Among Trees and Firewatch
1747000.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
